parameters.name: X-Internal-Secret
parameters.description: Shared secret required for internal service-to-service requests

401.description: AUTH_001 referenceId ownership violation; Missing or invalid X-Internal-Secret rejected before controller execution

X-Correlation-Id.description: Correlation identifier echoed by the server for support and trace lookup

traceparent.description: W3C trace context returned by the server for end-to-end troubleshooting

422.description: VALIDATION-001 request contract or idempotency policy violation

executionPrice.description: Required for unresolved MARKET replay approval. Values outside maxVirtualFillDeviationBps fail with VALIDATION-002.

message.description: Optional unresolved-status detail shown for UNKNOWN/PENDING/MALFORMED responses.

rejectReason.description: Optional exchange rejection reason surfaced on REJECTED responses.

parseError.description: Optional FIX parser diagnostic surfaced on MALFORMED responses.

executedQty.description: Optional executed quantity for status correction paths such as PARTIALLY_FILLED.

executedPrice.description: Optional executed price for MARKET FILLED or partial execution correction paths.

recoveryStatus.description: Optional recovery state override. Use ESCALATED before manual replay.

requeryStatus.description: Optional simulated requery outcome for replay paths.

requeryExecutedQty.description: Optional executed quantity to pair with a simulated requery outcome.

requeryExecutedPrice.description: Optional executed price to pair with a simulated requery outcome.

referencePrice.description: Optional reference price override for legacy MARKET recovery rows.

symbol.description: KRX symbol code used to start the replay timeline.

seed.description: Deterministic replay seed used to derive timeline events.

speedFactor.description: Replay speed factor applied on each drain cycle.

symbol.description: KRX symbol code used to query the latest stored quote snapshot.
KRX symbol codes used to query the latest stored quote snapshots.

items.description: KRX symbol codes used to query the latest stored quote snapshots.
